<?php

/**
 * @file
 * Fixture: a block build() that declares #cache before returning.
 *
 * The #cache keyword appears before the return, so the tempered pattern
 * stops short; the block also returns a variable rather than an inline
 * "return [" literal. Either reason keeps it out of the report.
 */

namespace Drupal\my_module\Plugin\Block;

use Drupal\Core\Cache\Cache;

/**
 * A well-behaved block with explicit cache metadata.
 */
class CachedBlock {

  public function build() {
    $build = [
      '#markup' => 'Hello',
    ];
    $build['#cache'] = [
      'max-age' => Cache::PERMANENT,
      'contexts' => ['user.permissions'],
    ];
    return $build;
  }

}
